title: lastrea glanduligera
intro: Lastrea glanduligera, also known as the glandular lastrea or Chinese maidenhair, is a species of fern native to Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lastrea glanduligera include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Lastrea glanduligera include tea infusions and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the fronds in hot water or simmering them in water to create a medicinal solution.
